title: [lichen_l2.c:1407-1416] fail_late_init path does not clear peer_table
description: In the fail_late_init cleanup path (lines 1407-1416), the code sets iface_init_failed, clears RX callback, and calls lichen_link_cleanup(), but does NOT clear peer_table. Compare with the disable path at lines 1071-1075 which explicitly zeros peer_table with secure_zero. If init fails after peers were added (unlikely but possible if peer_add is called from another thread during init), the stale peer entries would persist. Security: peer pubkeys should be cleared on init failure.
close_reason: Fixed: Added secure_zero(peer_table) to fail_late_init path to match disable path cleanup behavior
